About Us

Jiya Traders is a local building-material supplier in Saharanpur. The website is designed to be easy, fast and mobile friendly.

We supply the basic materials needed for construction work, including cement brands such as Ultratech, Shree and Bangur, along with sand and bajri. Our goal is to help customers quickly find the shop, check what is available, and contact us without confusion.
